underlying_goal: Read and extract the content of a Feishu wiki document about 'Pollo 2.0 产品框架改版'
friction_detail: Feishu's virtual scrolling prevented Claude from extracting the full document content, requiring many repeated attempts to scroll and capture missing sections.
brief_summary: User wanted to read a Feishu wiki page but Claude struggled with virtual scrolling and the user interrupted before full content was extracted.
